channel.title: Expeditions on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in Expeditions on Alien Truth Social

item.title: Kosmopoisk
item.description:
Kosmopoisk, also known as Spacesearch, is a pseudoscientific organization founded in 1980 that investigates ufology, cryptozoology, and other mysteries. The group expanded into an international movement in 2001 and officially registered as the All-Russian Scientific Organization in 2004. Kosmopoisk organizes expeditions to various locations to research anomalous phenomena and creatures. The organization claims to have over 2,500 members in numerous groups across 25 countries and has conducted over 250 expeditions.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kosmopoisk
